name: Idaho Strategic Resources, Inc.
summary: Idaho Strategic Resources, Inc. (IDR) is a mining company focused on gold and critical minerals exploration and production. The company operates properties in Idaho, with activities spanning mineral exploration, development, and extraction. IDR is involved in the gold mining sector as well as strategic and critical minerals relevant to domestic resource needs.
